description: In MySQL Workbench, archive the Sakila database `payment` table into a new partitioned table named `payment_archive` to optimize date-based queries. Use the following credentials: host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123. The `payment_archive` table must contain the data from `payment` and use RANGE partitioning on the `payment_date` year with partitions `p2005` (values less than 2006), `p2006` (values less than 2007), and `p_future` (values less than MAXVALUE). Create a stored procedure named `sp_partition_stats` in the `sakila` database that returns the partition name and row count for each partition in `payment_archive` by querying INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS. Export the results of calling this procedure to /home/ga/Documents/exports/partition_stats.csv.
